items: Bryan Reynolds homered 2 times, driving in 3 as Pittsburgh beat The Athletics, 6-5.
Logan Gilbert held down Baltimore for 7.0 innings, striking out 10 in Seattle's 3-1 win.
The Dodgers pitching combined to shut out Tampa Bay, 1-0.
The Angels pitching combined to shut out Arizona, 7-0.
St. Louis walked off San Diego, 3-2 — one of 3 one-run finishes across the league.
The Yankees routed Chicago White Sox, 12-2.
